data.text: Widget Pro is a configurable industrial widget designed for…

notes: Resolve dynamic_key 'dynamic:document_configuration' to its content_block_id by paginating GET /documents/content-blocks?search=dynamic:document_configuration and filtering on is_dynamic=true && key='dynamic:document_configuration' client-side (the route does NOT honour ?is_dynamic= as a query param).

Resolve dynamic_key 'dynamic:document_pricing' the same way. The offer doc_type's default_layout (app/services/document_types.py) ships dynamic:document_pricing for the pricing chapter; dynamic:document_line_items belongs to the quote doc_type instead — verify against GET /documents/doc-types before publishing.
